description: 9 tools for AI agents — content extraction, sentiment analysis, multi-source research, URL comparison, structured data extraction, sentiment trends, competitor intelligence, content monitoring, and executive brief generation. Credit-based subscription + x402 micropayments.

tools.name: extract
tools.description: Extract clean readable content from any URL

tools.name: analyze

tools.name: research
tools.description: Multi-source research synthesis on any topic

tools.description: Extract structured JSON from URLs with custom schema support

tools.name: sentiment_over_time
tools.description: Sentiment trend analysis across multiple sources

tools.name: monitor_page
tools.description: Content hash monitoring with watch mode
